SNTM-STACK v1.0
binary: target/riscv64imac-unknown-none-elf/release/task_indirect
arch: rv64
mode: sum-of-frames (over-approximation)
caveat: call-graph-aware transitive analysis post-SAFE

frames:
  0x80800000  task_indirect::main                32 byte
  0x80800040  dispatch_table_entry                0 byte

direct_call_edges: 1
indirect_calls: 1
  - 0x80800024 Jalr32 { rd: 1, rs1: 5 }
recursion: none

status: FAIL
reason: indirect call (jalr rd != x0 or c.jalr) detected
max_stack_bytes: 0xFFFFFFFF
